title: User Management
description: The User Management panel lets administrators create, modify, and deactivate user accounts, assign roles, and reset passwords. New users receive a temporary password by email and are prompted to change it on first login.
tips: Use roles rather than individual permissions — roles bundle appropriate permissions for common job functions.
The 'analyst' role is appropriate for most research users; 'admin' for IT staff; 'super-admin' for system owners only.
Deactivating a user (rather than deleting) preserves audit trail entries linked to that account.
Users with 'PHI Access' role can view patient timelines — grant this role only to clinically credentialed staff.
All role changes are logged in the Audit Log with the admin who made the change and the timestamp.
